name: Personal AI Financial Assistant
description: AI-powered finance assistant with persistent memory and natural language expense tracking. Accessible via Telegram with automated categorization and Google Sheets as data layer.

name: Filter Ticket
description: Production-ready customer care platform for ISP companies with real-time complaint tracking, push notifications, role-based access control, and analytics dashboard.

name: Monitor Subscription
description: Published open-source Angular library for monitoring and auto-unsubscribing RxJS observables in real-time, preventing memory leaks. Compatible with Angular 12–18.

name: Fast Direct Message WhatsApp
description: A simple app to send WhatsApp messages without saving the contact first.

name: Pokedex
description: Hybrid (Android, iOS and web) application to browse and get details on Pokémon.
